The taxi continues with the camera tracking slowly, the medium frame keeping the vehicle centered as lights flicker and signage looms, heightening the sense of motion through the urban pulse. In the final close shot, the taxi nears the foreground as the lens pushes in, focusing on the taxi's details while the surrounding billboards and traffic blur slightly, underscoring how a single taxi embodies the energy and rhythm of Times Square.
